api_key.description: Pennylane API key. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: Pennylane API base URL override for tests or proxies.

filter.description: Optional Pennylane filter query expression, sent verbatim as the filter query param.

sort.description: Optional Pennylane sort expression, sent verbatim as the sort query param.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
